---
title: "test_pennyone_load.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/benchmarks/test_pennyone_load.ts"
loc: 34
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.20
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 5.53
overall_score: 5.96
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [runScan](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/index.ts)
- [*](file://fs/promises)
- [*](file://path)
- [test](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)

### Exports
- `runLoadTest`
- `testDir`
- `fileCreationPromises`
- `i`
- `filePath`
- `content`
- `start`
- `results`
- `duration`
